Text: The food itself was enjoyed, the chef is amazing! We chose a menu for 1500 per person, ordered dishes from the head chef and one salad, but without our extras the treat would have been sufficient.

The price list at this establishment is democratic: a bowl of borscht costs 200 UAH, Nemir vodka is 80 UAH/800 UAH, a glass of wine (I don't remember which one) is 150 UAH, Kent cigarettes with a lighter are 100 UAH, some draft Ukrainian beer (tasty though) is 150 UAH (bottled is 130 UAH), the total bill for three people including alcohol came to 1470 UAH plus tea.
They were always satisfied - the salads are always made with fresh vegetables, incredibly tasty khachapuri, and very decent lagman.
The staff turned out to be very attentive and polite, starting from the girl at the front desk downstairs to several waiters.
Just like 3 years ago, there's nothing new in the menu, just pizzas and pastas.
In my opinion, new dishes should be added to the menu at least once a year so that people find it interesting to try something new.
Very attentive servers and administrators.

The only thing that didn't quite please me was the long wait for service to begin (probably due to the large number of people), and the dishes from neighboring tables were not cleared when the people left.
Thank you for the steak 'Tower' first to the chef, very deliciously prepared, second to the girl for the recommendation.
The portion was very decent!
Although the couches could have been made cozier, more "homely," with cushions.
The interior is nothing special, clean and quiet, music in the neighboring hall, but we specifically wanted it without music.
The food was enjoyable, especially the dessert - Napoleon, very tasty.
Administrator Victoria immediately compiled the menu, took into account all our wishes, and gave advice on organizing the banquet.
We waited for a long time as the girl (see above) dressed and undressed the guests.
Food is always tasty.
black caesar was also very decent, made with flavor.
The service was excellent, the waitresses were great after the event, they helped us not only pack the food but also all the flowers that were given to us!
We will recommend the restaurant to our friends.

The Caesar salad consisted of the following components: at the bottom were four large pieces cut from a baguette, on top was lettuce, then some tomato and four large strips of chicken, there was no parmesan at all, cool?
The menu really made me spend a long time choosing, and not because there was nothing to choose from, but rather because I wanted to try so many things.
Excellent cuisine.
A pleasant interior - it really lightens up my mood and makes me feel calm.

It's a pity there's no lamb shish kebab, but they've just opened, so I think the menu will expand! And from pork, I tried a piece that my husband had - it was tender, juicy, and I haven't eaten anything like it for a hundred years, and not dried out as usual)))) Caesar salad - the tastiest version I've ever had (I've tried Caesar salads everywhere!) and very tasty kvass... Everything we ordered was good, and both my husband and I are quite picky about food. Well done.
For the hotel restaurant, I think it's too dark and gloomy inside, but outside it's good, wooden tables and chairs under umbrellas, fresh air - that's where we settled.
As it was many years ago, the service is at a high level.
And it's also very pleasant that they bring a plate with water and lemon for washing hands: I love eating shashlik with my hands.
Great restaurant!
All my guests were very satisfied, by the way everyone who ate the steak remembers it :)
I will tell a wonderful story about how at the restaurant 'Triple' they value customers.
Of course, I can't help but mention the beer! I would give it its own scale and rate it 11 out of 10... meaning better than excellent!
And they greet, and see off (without scary screams in Japanese:)), and repeat orders, and follow the sequence of dishes, and change the ashtray without additional request.
The food was brought very quickly, the waiter answered any menu questions without hesitation, he worked very professionally.

In the kitchen: the cod with spinach was very enjoyable, we've never encountered such tender cod anywhere, the roasted vegetable salad surprised us)) mostly everything pleased us, we left satisfied and full.
The food is generally tasty, there are no complaints, portions are adequate.
The interior is pleasant, the lighting is soft, the seats are comfortable, the music is well-chosen)
A small quiet cafe.
The service was enjoyable, the staff is polite, orders are brought quite quickly.
